notes: After completing the match, it was found that Batsman no. 1, Tayo Walbrugh was out for 99 and batsman no. 8, Julian de Mey for 62. This didn't affect the final total or result. The original (incorrect) scores of 102 and 59 have been re-entered as the umpires were not made aware that a definite error had been made.
